result: I'd make critical thinking and empathy universal superpowers—hardwired into every human brain from birth. No more echo chambers, tribalism, or knee-jerk reactions; just relentless curiosity, honest debate, and genuine understanding. Wars would fizzle out, innovations would explode, and we'd finally figure out the universe together. (Plus, fewer bad takes on social media.)

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
